videos.title: Dogecoin gets lift from Elon Musk tweet, GamesStop rises
videos.text: we are going to take a look at what's going on in the markets right now as we see this rally i'll be at a a pretty modest one right now our jared blickery is with us here with an update so what's going on in the market today jared well a modest rally it is but we'll take those gains it looks like the dao s p 500 and nasdaq and the russell 2000 each up around one third of one percent a little bit less than that so the out performance by both tech and the small caps continues both of those going up in line together taking a look at the at the nasdaq 100 heat map here we see tesla's standout that's down about three percent amazon apple both slightly in the red but facebook alphabet and microsoft solidly in the green here but i want to get to our heavily shorted board because some interesting things going on gamestop has been in the green for most of the day well it looks like it's expressed let's get back to gamestop uh up five percent now been up as much as fifteen percent but you can see one on this five-day chart that the volatility has really tamped down and maybe 45 is a level here of support we'll have to see going forward but the standout in this group which we were talking about before in a different context is sundial growers that cannabis play up 44 today up 97 over the last five days and now off to crypto land where we have bitcoin and ether taking a little bit of a breather after coming off of those record highs but guess what xrp is up six percent and we also have dogecoin in focus here that is still down about one percent and this is despite elon musk tweeting about it and we have that tweet coming up here uh bought some ditch coin excuse me punch some dogecoin for little x so he can be a toddler hodler and uh yeah more deutsche news so there you go guys as it is all right thanks so much jerry
